Jersey discusses why he expects the Fed to remain on hold for at least the next several months, even after Jay Powell’s departure and Kevin Warsh’s expected arrival as chair. He examines the significance of recent FOMC dissents, the challenges Warsh may face in building support for rate cuts

title: Coinbase Swings to a Loss While Posting Another Revenue Drop
title_cn: Coinbase 陷入亏损，收入再次下降
summary: Just days after announcing deep job cuts made to manage costs in volatile markets and to harness advances in artificial intelligence, Coinbase Global Inc. showed how substantially a lingering crypto bear market can weigh on results.

title_cn: 林郑月娥：波动后私人信贷经理数量减少

title: Stocks Fall on Doubts Over Imminent US-Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市因对即将达成的美伊协议的怀疑而下跌：市场结束
summary: A rally that drove stocks to record highs faltered and oil whipsawed as doubts resurfaced about an imminent US-Iran deal that would revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

title: Optimistic About Private Credit Opportunities: Poli
title_cn: Poli 对私人信贷机会持乐观态度

The titans of private markets descended on Beverly Hills for the annual Milken Institute, where they made it clear they were ready to move on from private credit’s recent woes.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: PE Risk Is Being Priced in a More Rational Way, GTCR's Roche Says
title_cn: GTCR 的罗氏表示，PE 风险的定价方式更加合理
summary: GTCR Co-CEO and Managing Director Collin Roche reflects on the private equity landscape, emphasizing the importance of value creation over merely capitalizing on rising prices. Roche highlights GTCR's multibillion-dollar exit from Worldpay as a prime example of their strategy: backing executive teams to implement operational and strategic changes that improve business performance and justify higher exit multiples. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Saudi Wealth Fund Sells First Dollar Bonds Since Iran War
title_cn: 沙特财富基金出售伊朗战争以来第一批美元债券
summary: Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund saw strong demand for its $7 billion sale of dollar bonds, a sign that investors are keen on the return of Gulf issuers to public markets after disruptions during the Iran conflict.

title: US Stocks Fall From Record High as Market Awaits Iran’s Reply
title_cn: 由于市场等待伊朗的答复，美国股市从历史高位下跌
summary: US stocks pulled back from a record high as the US waits for Iran to respond to a proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war, while investors parsed a stream of earnings.

title: Canada Miner Sherritt Pulls Out of Cuba on Sanctions Threat
title_cn: 加拿大矿工谢里特因制裁威胁退出古巴
summary: Sherritt International Corp. halted joint venture activities in Cuba after President Donald Trump expanded US sanctions on the communist-run Caribbean country.

title: IEA Head Calls on Canada to Move Faster on Energy Amid Supply Shock
title_cn: IEA负责人呼吁加拿大在供应冲击中加快能源步伐
summary: The head of the International Energy Agency is urging Canada to move more quickly to develop and export its energy resources, warning that market conditions will only favor the country for so long.

title: Ex-Willkie Lawyer Pleaded Guilty in M&A Insider-Trading Case
title_cn: 前威尔基律师在并购内幕交易案中认罪
summary: A former Willkie Farr & Gallagher counsel is cooperating with prosecutors after pleading guilty to being one of the elite mergers and acquisitions lawyers who provided tips on deals to a massive insider trading ring.

title: Private Credit’s Birthplace Gives New Rise to 1980s-Style Greed
title_cn: 私人信贷的诞生地催生了 20 世纪 80 年代风格的贪婪
summary: Attendees walk past signage of the Milken Institute during the 29th annual Milken Institute Global Conference at the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, California on May 5, 2026.

title_cn: 交易商权衡美伊休战协议前景，铜价稳定
summary: Copper held steady after a three-day advance as traders weighed the prospects of an imminent US-Iran truce.

title: Oil Swings on Fading Optimism for Resolution on Iran Conflict
title_cn: 解决伊朗冲突的乐观情绪消退，油价波动
summary: Oil prices whipsawed on renewed doubts about a deal to end the US war in Iran and reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: GameStop's eBay Bid Is So Befuddling Even Merger Arbs Are Steering Clear
title_cn: GameStop 的 eBay 出价如此令人困惑，甚至连并购套利者都避开了
summary: On paper, GameStop Corp.’s head-turning $56 billion bid for eBay Inc. offers a potential fat profit for investors willing to wager on the unconventional deal. In practice, merger specialists aren’t buying it.

title: The K-Shaped Economy Is Here To Stay Says Homkes
title_cn: 霍克斯表示，K 型经济将继续存在
summary: Rebecca Homkes, Lecturer at the London Business School joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss how the war in the Middle East is changing the global outlook for Central Banks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cheniere Sags on Surprise $3.5 Billion Loss on Derivatives
title_cn: Cheniere 因衍生品意外亏损 35 亿美元而股价下跌
summary: Cheniere Energy Inc. plunged almost 10% after posting a surprise $3.5 billion loss driven by a drop in the value of hedges as the Iran war upended natural gas markets.

title: Test Your ETF Knowledge In Our IQ Test
title_cn: 在我们的 IQ 测试中测试您的 ETF 知识
summary: Bloomberg's Joel Weber puts Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas to the test on "Bloomberg ETF IQ" in this week's edition of "IQ Test." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Honduras Reviews China Deals, Mulls Restoring Taiwan Ties
title_cn: 洪都拉斯审视中国交易，考虑恢复与台湾的关系
summary: Honduras’ new president is reviewing his predecessor’s agreements with China, a process that could help the US push to reduce the Asian nation’s influence in the region and lead to recognition of Taiwan.

title: Inflows & Outflows For ETFs,  Mary Daly Speaks With Bloomberg Live | ETF IQ 5/7/2026
title_cn: 玛丽·戴利 (Mary Daly) 接受彭博社直播 | ETF 的流入和流出ETF IQ 2026 年 5 月 7 日
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Teucrim Head of ETF Solutions Maital Legum, Pacer ETFs President Sean O'Hara, San Francisco Fed President Mary Daly, and Tidal SVP Head of Business Development Brittany Christensen. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Colombia Buys Dollars in Spot Market as Swap Payment Looms
title_cn: 随着掉期支付的临近，哥伦比亚在现货市场购买美元
summary: Colombia’s finance ministry is once again buying dollars in the spot market, traders say, as authorities gear up to pay off a controversial Swiss franc swap before the presidential election later this month.

title: Fidelity, Schwab to Roll Out Fees For Certain ETFs
title_cn: 富达和嘉信理财将对某些 ETF 实行收费
summary: Brittany Christensen, senior vice president and head of business development at Tidal Financial Group, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss recent reports that Fidelity Investments and Charles Schwab will start charging platform fees for the trading of certain ETFs.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed’s Kashkari Says Next Rate Move Uncertain Because of Iran War
title_cn: 美联储卡什卡里表示，由于伊朗战争，下一步利率变动不确定
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis President Neel Kashkari said the conflict in the Middle East has added uncertainty to the outlook for interest rates.

title_cn: “GLTR”贵金属ETF表现亮眼
summary: Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas discuss abrdn Physical Precious Metals Basket Shares ETF (ticker: GLTR) on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: Bessent会见保险监管机构讨论私人信贷
summary: US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent met with insurance regulators to talk about their exposure to private credit as the increasingly complex ties between the two sectors fuels mounting regulatory scrutiny.

title: Pacer International ETF 'Outpaces' SPY, QQQ
title_cn: Pacer International ETF“超过”SPY、QQQ
summary: Sean O'Hara, president of Pacer ETFs, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss Pacer Nasdaq International Patent Leaders ETF (ticker: PATN), which has a total return exceeding 70% since its launch in 2024. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Maital Legum, head of ETF solutions at Teucrium, joins Scarlet Fu and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." They discuss the development of exchange traded products as US stocks hit record highs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dorsey’s Block Raises Full-Year Profit Forecast
title_cn: 多尔西 (Dorsey) 上调全年利润预测
summary: Shares of Block Inc. surged after it raised its full-year profit forecast following AI-related job cuts announced earlier in the year.

title: Datadog Shares Soar by Most in Six Years on Higher Outlook
title_cn: 展望更高，Datadog 股价六年来涨幅最大
summary: The shares of Datadog Inc. surged by the most in more than six years after the software developer raised its full-year outlook for sales and earnings, far exceeding Wall Street’s expectations.

title: MercadoLibre Slips As Profits Miss Despite Revenue Surge
title_cn: 尽管收入激增，MercadoLibre 仍因利润下滑而下滑
summary: Shares in e-commerce and fintech giant MercadoLibre Inc. slipped after profits missed estimates for the fourth quarter in a row even as revenue grew at its fastest pace in nearly four years.

title: Airbnb Boosts 2026 Revenue Outlook on Increased Bookings
title_cn: Airbnb 因预订量增加而上调 2026 年收入前景
summary: Airbnb Inc. boosted its revenue growth forecast for the year on “particularly strong” bookings in the Americas and benefits from simplifying its fee structure for hosts and guests.

title: Expedia Revenue Beat Shows Middle East Resilience, Eyes World Cup
title_cn: Expedia 收入增长显示中东地区的韧性，关注世界杯
summary: Expedia Group Inc. posted quarterly revenue that came in slightly ahead of estimates as it overcame Middle East-related travel disruptions and flagged healthy demand from this summer’s FIFA World Cup.

title: Arm Warns of Phone Market Weakness | Bloomberg Tech 5/7/2026
title_cn: Arm 警告手机市场疲软彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 7 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde speaks with Arm CEO Rene Haas about sluggishness in the smartphone industry and growing demand from AI data centers. Plus, Anthropic signs an agreement with Elon Musk's SpaceX to access computing resources from its competitor. And, the CEO of HawkEye 360 discusses the satellite surveillance firm's IPO, which raised $416 million.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: La informalidad impulsa el reinado del efectivo en México
title_cn: 墨西哥的非正规性推动了现金的统治
summary: La arraigada cultura del pago en efectivo del país se mantiene firme frente a un esfuerzo implacable de cientos de millones de dólares por parte de las empresas de tecnología financiera

title: HawkEye 360 Goes Public In Latest Sign of IPO Demand
title_cn: HawkEye 360​​ 上市，IPO 需求最新迹象
summary: Hawkeye 360, a provider of satellite-based signals intelligence for US government agencies, raised $416 million in its US market debut. It’s the latest sign that the IPO market is picking up steam. HawkEye 360 CEO John Serafini speaks with Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech Sector Layoffs Keep Mounting As Cuts in Other Sectors Fall
title_cn: 随着其他行业裁员的减少，科技行业裁员持续增加
summary: Tech sector job cuts and layoff announcements continue to mount in the US, even as overall private-sector layoff plans recede. Bloomberg’s Julia Fanzeres discusses what is driving the move in tech and how that’s translating to the wider economy. She joins Caroline Hyde on "Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Day 3 From the Milken Institute Global Conference | The Close 5/6/2026
title_cn: 米尔肯研究所全球会议第三天 |收盘价 2026 年 5 月 6 日
summary:
Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Eldridge CEO Tony Minella, JPMorgan Asset Management’s Jed Laskowitz, Charlesbank CEO Michael Choe, Match Group CEO Spencer Rascoff, Milwaukee Brewers Principal Owner Mark Attanasio, Bruin Capital CEO George Pyne, Former Wells Fargo CEO Tim Sloan, Tikehau Capital’s Mathieu Chabran, Partners Capital CEO Arjun Raghavan, Ellevest CEO Sylvia Kwan, Guggenheim Investments President Dina DiLorenzo, Barclays’ Brad Rogoff, Hunter Point CEO Avi Kalichstein, B Capital Co-CEO Raj Ganguly, & Warner Records CEO Aaron Bay-Schuck.
(Correct: This video has been edited to correct the title of the guest) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Camera-Equipped AirPods Reach Late Testing in AI Device Push
title_cn: Apple 配备摄像头的 AirPods 在 AI 设备推送中进行了较晚的测试
summary: Apple Inc. has reached the late stages of development for new AirPods with built-in cameras, a significant milestone for what will likely be its first wearable device designed for the artificial intelligence era.

title: Everyone Wants a Piece of Ina Garten’s Forthcoming Podcast
title_cn: 每个人都想听听伊娜·加滕即将推出的播客
summary: Deal offers are reaching seven figures a year for a program that has yet to launch.

title: CoreWeave’s Stunning Rally Creates Prove-It Moment for Earnings
title_cn: CoreWeave 的惊人反弹为盈利创造了证明时刻
summary: CoreWeave Inc. shares are on a scorching run in 2026 as demand for computing capacity to power artificial intelligence keeps growing. But now investors want to see some proof that the neo-cloud provider is executing on its ambitious plans.

title: Apollo’s Marc Rowan Warns of Fallout From ‘Massive Geopolitical’ Shift
title_cn: 阿波罗计划的马克·罗文警告“大规模地缘政治”转变的影响
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. Chief Executive Officer Marc Rowan said the world isn’t prepared for the shakeout from artificial intelligence, price pressures and rising government debt.

title: BlackRock Private Credit Fund Cuts Asset Value on Markdowns
title_cn: 贝莱德私人信贷基金降价削减资产价值
summary: BlackRock Inc. cut the value of its publicly-traded private credit fund by about 5%, as it struggled under the weight of troubled loans, markdowns and lower returns.

title: Arm CEO Sees AI Demand While Smartphone Business Slumps
title_cn: Arm 首席执行官在智能手机业务下滑的同时看到了人工智能需求
summary: Rene Haas, chief executive officer of Arm Holdings Plc, says demand for AI-related products is buoying the company amid a slowdown in its smartphone business. He speaks with Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MNTN CEO: TV Remains Dominant Medium as Streaming Grows
title_cn: MNTN 首席执行官：随着流媒体的发展，电视仍然是主导媒体
summary: MNTN CEO Mark Douglas joins Bloomberg Open Interest to push back on the idea that TV is dying, arguing it remains the most powerful entertainment medium on earth. He explains how streaming is opening TV advertising to new businesses, why AI video tools are lowering production costs, and why the World Cup could be a massive moment for advertisers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm Sees ‘Explosion’ in CPU Demand on AI Amid Smartphone Slump
title_cn: 在智能手机低迷的情况下，Arm 认为 AI 对 CPU 的需求将出现“爆炸式增长”
summary: Arm Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Rene Haas said the company is experiencing an “explosion of demand” for its CPU architecture driven by AI workloads in data centers, with orders doubling to $2 billion in just five weeks.

title: TD’s eBay Financing Assumes GameStop Wins Longshot Credit Rating
title_cn: TD 的 eBay 融资假设 GameStop 赢得 Longshot 信用评级
summary: GameStop Corp.’s proposed $20 billion financing of its bid for eBay Inc. rests on the assumption that the combined company’s debt would be investment grade, a premise that people familiar with the matter and at least one ratings firm suggest is far from a sure thing.

title: Arm Slides After Smartphone Slowdown Overshadows AI Growth
title_cn: 智能手机增速放缓掩盖人工智能增长后，手臂滑落
summary: Arm Holdings Plc shares declined as much as 9% after a slowdown in the smartphone industry took a toll on the chip company’s royalty revenue, overshadowing its growth in the AI data center market.

title: Why AI Isn’t a Threat to Wall Street Traders Just Yet
title_cn: 为什么人工智能还没有对华尔街交易员构成威胁
summary:
Anthropic's latest AI agents are designed to win over Wall Street — but experiments show LLMs aren't ready to replace traders.

Justina Lee explains why your fund manager is safe in their job, for now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Israeli Shekel at 32-Year High Is Causing Angst in Tech Industry
title_cn: 以色列谢克尔创 32 年新高引发科技行业焦虑
summary: Despite global condemnation over Israel’s regional wars, the shekel is at a 32-year high, giving the government something to brag about, but fueling anxiety in the vital tech industry.

title: AI Boom Drives Earnings Growth
title_cn: 人工智能热潮推动盈利增长
summary: Bernstein Private Wealth CIO Alex Chaloff says the market’s explosive earnings growth is being fueled by trillion-dollar AI spending from hyperscalers. But while AI may drive productivity and IPO demand, he warns the labor market could be the weak spot as companies increasingly ask what jobs AI can replace. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Eldridge Capital Management CEO: Data Center Demand ‘Not Going Away’
title_cn: 埃尔德里奇资本管理公司首席执行官：数据中心需求“不会消失”
summary: CEO of Eldridge Capital Management Tony Minella discusses leaning into AI as an ‘enabler,’ why AI data center demand is not going away, and the undeniable strength of the equity markets. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kraken Parent to Buy Reap Technologies for $600 Million
title_cn: Kraken 母公司将以 6 亿美元收购 Reap Technologies
summary: The owner of crypto exchange Kraken has agreed to pay $600 million for Reap Technologies, a stablecoin-oriented provider of cross-border and business payments services.

title: The Messy, Humiliating Courtroom Drama Between Elon Musk and OpenAI
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 与 OpenAI 之间混乱、羞辱的法庭戏剧
summary: Artificial intelligence companies were already unpopular before the billionaires started fighting in court.

title: GameStop CEO Says eBay Shut Account After Funding Stunt
title_cn: GameStop 首席执行官表示 eBay 在资助噱头后关闭了账户
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen said his eBay Inc. account was suspended following a publicity stunt in which he listed a raft of personal items — including a pair of socks — to fund his $56 billion bid for the online marketplace.

title: Google Launches $100 Fitbit Air Without a Screen to Rival Whoop
title_cn: 谷歌推出售价 100 美元的无屏幕 Fitbit Air 与 Whoop 竞争
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google on Thursday launched the Fitbit Air, a $100 screenless fitness band aimed squarely at taking on Whoop Inc. and other makers of health and fitness wearables that forgo displays.

title: For Trump and Xi, Low Expectations for Beijing Summit Next Week
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平对下周北京峰会的期望较低
summary: There are many points of contention, but substantive deals are unlikely

title: Honduras’ New President Reviews China Ties
title_cn: 洪都拉斯新总统回顾中国关系
summary: Newly inaugurated Honduran President Nasry Asfura is reviewing agreements made with China by his predecessor, Xiomara Castro, before deciding on restoring relations with Taiwan. Asfura spoke to Bloomberg's Erik Schatzker on May 6 on the sidelines of the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: El agresivo despliegue militar de Trump en Panamá mantiene a América Latina en vilo
title_cn: 特朗普在巴拿马的侵略性军事部署让拉丁美洲陷入悬念
summary: Trump busca el “dominio estadounidense” en la región con el mayor despliegue de tropas de EE.UU. de la historia.

title: Trump Gives EU Until July 4 to Ink Deal, Extending Deadline
title_cn: 特朗普允许欧盟在 7 月 4 日之前签署墨水协议，延长最后期限
summary: President Donald Trump said he would give the European Union until July 4 to ratify its trade agreement with the US, after previously threatening to hike tariffs on auto imports as soon as this week if it failed to do so.

title: US Awaits Iran's Peace Deal Response | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/07/2026
title_cn: 美国等待伊朗和平协议回应|权力平衡：早期版本 5/07/2026
summary: Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz deliver insight and analysis on the latest headlines from the White House and Capitol Hill, including conversations with influential lawmakers and key figures in politics and policy. The US is waiting on Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a war that’s killed thousands of people, with tensions still high in both the Persian Gulf and in Lebanon. Iran’s leaders are yet to indicate whether they’ll accept the terms of the deal, though they’ve previously shown little sign of yielding on their nuclear program and accepting a moratorium on enriching uranium, both top US demands. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed Can't Lose Credibility, Says Doubleline's Campbell
title_cn: Doubleline 的坎贝尔表示，美联储不能失去信誉
summary: Bill Campbell, Doubleline Global, Sovereign and Emerging Markets Head, talks about how the war with Iran is impacting markets, a lasting inflation shock and making sure markets don't lose confidence in the Federal Reserve. He speaks on a special "Bloomberg The Close" from Los Angeles. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Farkas: Iran's Nuclear Program is "Number One Problem"
title_cn: 法卡斯：伊朗核计划是“头号问题”
summary:
The US is waiting on Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a war that’s killed thousands of people, with tensions still high in both the Persian Gulf and in Lebanon. Iran’s leaders are yet to indicate whether they’ll accept the terms of the deal, though they’ve previously shown little sign of yielding on their nuclear program and accepting a moratorium on enriching uranium, both top US demands.

Evelyn Farkas is Executive Director of the McCain Institute and Former Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense for Russia, Ukraine, and Eurasia. She speaks with Bloomberg's Kailey Leinz on Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Warn Stalls Trump's Affordability Agenda
title_cn: 伊朗警告阻碍特朗普的负担能力议程
summary:
The Trump administration’s fitful campaign to address US voters’ affordability concerns ahead of the midterm elections is faltering, with some key efforts stalled, cast aside or limited in scope. 

The war in Iran has driven up gas prices and sent a chill through the spring housing market. It has also drowned out the administration’s set-piece events meant to highlight larger tax refunds and measures to lower drug prices.

Liz Pancotti, Managing Director of Policy and Advocacy at the Groundwork Collaborative, discusses how consumers are experiencing a spending slowdown. She speaks with Bloomberg's Kailey Leinz on Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pentagon Watchdog Declines to Probe Kid Rock Flights
title_cn: 五角大楼监管机构拒绝调查 Kid Rock 航班
summary: The Defense Department’s independent watchdog is declining to investigate a US Army helicopter flight near the home of musician Kid Rock and at a “No Kings” protest against President Donald Trump, according to a letter from the Pentagon’s new inspector general.

title: Chilean President Kast’s Mega Economic Bill Clears First Hurdle as Trouble Brews
title_cn: 智利总统卡斯特的大型经济法案扫清了困境中的第一个障碍
summary: Chilean President José Antonio Kast’s flagship economic bill cleared its first congressional hurdle on Thursday, but the vote gives the new administration little respite as it works to muster legislative support.

title: Rubio Approves $25.8 Billion in Weapons Push for Mideast Nations
title_cn: 卢比奥批准向中东国家提供 258 亿美元的武器
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio approved the sale of hundreds of prized air-defense interceptors and other weapons to Middle East partners in deals worth $25.8 billion, three times the amount disclosed when the administration announced the agreements last week.

title: Trump’s Summit With Xi Is On Despite China’s Iran Concerns
title_cn: 尽管中国担心伊朗问题，特朗普与习近平的峰会仍在进行
summary: President Donald Trump is forging ahead with plans to hold a summit with counterpart Xi Jinping next week in Beijing, despite unease among Chinese officials about holding the high-stakes meeting before the war in Iran is resolved.

title: Trump Praises Brazil’s Lula After Meeting on Tariffs, Trade
title_cn: 特朗普在关税和贸易会议后赞扬巴西卢拉
summary: US President Donald Trump said he discussed trade and tariffs with Brazil’s Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva at the White House, and their two governments agreed to continue discussing the often-divisive issues.

title: Prediction Market Ban for US House Members, Staff Gets GOP Push
title_cn: 共和党推动美国众议院议员和工作人员禁止预测市场
summary: Rep. Ashley Hinson (R-Iowa) introduced a resolution Thursday that would amend the House rules to ban members and their staff from trading on prediction markets.

title: US Awaits Iranian Response on Deal as Israel Strikes Lebanon
title_cn: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩，美国等待伊朗对协议作出回应
summary: The US is waiting on Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a war that’s killed thousands of people, with tensions still high in both the Persian Gulf and in Lebanon.

title: Ghana Asks AU to Probe Xenophobic Attacks in South Africa
title_cn: 加纳要求非盟调查南非的仇外袭击事件
summary: Ghana escalated a complaint over attacks on its citizens in South Africa, urging the African Union to weigh in after a spate of anti-foreigner protests fanned fears of xenophobic violence.

title: Leonardo Vote Narrowly Backs New Meloni Board After CEO Row
title_cn: 莱昂纳多在 CEO 争吵后以微弱优势投票支持新 Meloni 董事会
summary: Leonardo SpA shareholders narrowly approved the Italian government’s slate of board nominees, who overcame a protest vote over Rome’s decision to oust the defense company’s chief executive officer.

title: US Sanctions Iraqi Oil Official, Militia Leaders Linked to Iran
title_cn: 美国制裁与伊朗有关的伊拉克石油官员和民兵领导人
summary: The US sanctioned Iraq’s deputy oil minister and three militia leaders for exploiting the country’s oil sector and supporting Iranian-backed terrorist activity, ramping up pressure on Tehran and its regional proxies as the Trump administration seeks a deal to end a war in its 10th week.

title: French Far-Right’s Bardella Linked to EU Funds Probe, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称法国极右翼分子巴尔德拉与欧盟资金调查有关
summary: European Union prosecutors are investigating possible misappropriation of EU funds relating to media training for French far-right National Rally leader Jordan Bardella and other party members, Agence France-Presse reports, citing a person close to the case.

title: Mexico Plans $8 Billion in Gas Pipelines to Boost Power Sector
title_cn: 墨西哥计划投资 80 亿美元建设天然气管道以促进电力行业发展
summary: Mexico is planning to invest 140 billion pesos ($8.1 billion) in new gas pipelines over the next four years, the latest step in President Claudia Sheinbaum’s plan to boost the country’s power generation.

title: Polish President Seeks Referendum on ‘Costly’ EU Climate Policy
title_cn: 波兰总统寻求就“代价高昂”的欧盟气候政策进行公投
summary: Poland’s nationalist President Karol Nawrocki said he wanted to call a referendum on European Union climate policy in a move that’s bound to create fresh tensions with the pro-EU government and with Brussels.

title: NY Announces $268 Billion Budget Deal Including Second-Home Tax
title_cn: 纽约州宣布 2680 亿美元的预算协议，其中包括第二居所税
summary: Hochul has resisted calls to raise income taxes on millionaires and large corporations ahead of competitive primary races.

title: Zelenskiy’s Top Envoy Arrives in US to Renew Stalled Peace Talks
title_cn: 泽连斯基的高级特使抵达美国重启陷入僵局的和平谈判
summary: Ukraine’s chief negotiator Rustem Umerov arrived in the US for meetings with President Donald Trump’s envoys in a bid to reinvigorate stalled peace talks with Russia, President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said.

title: How Israel’s Battle With Lebanon’s Hezbollah Fits Into the Iran War
title_cn: 以色列与黎巴嫩真主党的战斗如何融入伊朗战争
summary: When the Lebanese militia Hezbollah entered the US-Israeli war against Iran by firing rockets and drones into Israel the day after the conflict began on Feb. 28, officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive the militia, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border. They’ve been loath to give it up.

title: Merz Responds to Industry Rebuke With Pledge to Move on Reforms
title_cn: 梅尔茨回应行业指责，承诺推进改革
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz told industry leaders that he’ll press ahead with his reform agenda after the head of a leading German business lobby called the conservative leader’s ruling coalition unreliable.

title: Bulgaria’s Radev Picks Cabinet After Sweeping Victory
title_cn: 保加利亚的拉德夫大获全胜后任命内阁
summary: Bulgaria’s incoming Prime Minister Rumen Radev proposed his cabinet lineup as he prepares to take office after a landslide election victory, breaking years of political deadlock.

title: Saudi Arabia Boosted Logistics Spending to Blunt Impact of War
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯增加物流支出以减轻战争影响
summary: Saudi Arabia brought forward some planned spending on infrastructure and food imports to soften the impact of the Iran war and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a move that added to its budget deficit in the first quarter.

title: Ukraine Said It Hit Major Oil Refinery Deep Inside Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯境内的主要炼油厂
summary: Ukraine said it hit a major oil refinery deep inside Russia, as Moscow and Kyiv exchanged strikes ahead of Victory Day celebrations.
